title: Cogni multi-repo sync manifest
description: spec.repo-sync-contract — declares operator-scope paths and intentional divergences across the hub + artifact repos. Mirrors the CATALOG_IS_SSOT pattern (infra/catalog/_schema.json). See docs/spec/repo-sync-contract.md.

schema.description: Manifest schema version. Bumps require lock-step PRs across all repos per MANIFEST_BOOTSTRAP.

hub.description: GitHub owner/repo of the canonical hub. Per HUB_IS_COGNI_MONOREPO this is Cogni-DAO/cogni.

path_map.description: Optional hub-path → artifact-path overrides. Empty object means 1:1.

scope.description: Glob patterns for operator-scope paths. Enumerated, not blanket — adding a path is a deliberate hub PR per MANIFEST_IS_SSOT.

path.description: Path or glob within scope[] where divergence is intentional. Cross-ref validated by scripts/validate-sync-manifest-refs.mjs.
